title: Oregon DEQ Proposes to Delay the CFP 2024 Annual Report Deadline Following Cyberattack
content: Oregon DEQ is proposing to delay the 2024 Annual Report Deadline to Friday, May 30, 2025 due to the cyberattack and extended outage of the Oregon Fuels Reporting System.On Wednesday April 9, DEQ was struck with a cyberattack that crippled agency systems, including the Oregon Fuels Reporting System that is used by fuel suppliers to file their reporting for the CFP and Greenhouse Gas Reporting Program, generate and trade Clean Fuels Program credits, and demonstrate compliance with the Clean Fuels Program.
author: Analysts Account
